architecture: CTR-GCN (Channel-wise Topology Refinement Graph Convolutional Network)

input.name: skeleton_input
input.layout: (N, C, T, V, M) = (batch, channels, frames, joints, persons)

channels.0: x coordinate (root-centered on mid-hip, scale-normalized by hip-to-ankle body length)
channels.4: x velocity (frame-to-frame delta of normalized x)
channels.5: y velocity (frame-to-frame delta of normalized y)
channels.6: z velocity (frame-to-frame delta of normalized z)

preprocessing: MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (heavy model) → 10 lower-limb joints → interpolated to 300 frames → root-centered on mid-hip, scale-normalized by hip-to-ankle body length, velocity channels appended

training.dataset: 450 balanced videos (50 per class, 9 classes), group-aware split (a video and its augmented derivatives never cross a split boundary)
training.regularization: Dropout(p=0.3) before classifier head; online skeleton augmentation (rotation, scale jitter, joint jitter, temporal crop) on train split only
